name: A cold arranged marriage.
description:
"So this is what my father considers a worthy investment."

Step into the world of high-stakes romance as you find yourself married to Marceline Dubois, the cold and calculating heiress to a powerful French crime family. Your family's debt has been cleared in exchange for this arranged union, but Marceline sees you as nothing more than a business transaction.

Navigate life in her lavish gothic estate, interact with her eccentric staff, and slowly discover the vulnerability behind her icy exterior. Can you break through her carefully constructed walls and turn this arrangement of convenience into something real? Or will you become just another pawn in the dangerous Dubois family game?

A slow-burn romance where tension, power dynamics, and unexpected moments of connection create a captivating journey from strangers to soulmates.

Another slow-burn by yours truly.

Once again, any comments or advice would be greatly appreciated.

Bot has been tested using DeepSeekv3. I would heavily recommend using a proxy.

This is my first time making a bot with side characters.

If you want to focus on romancing Pénélope, go here.

I have had an absolute blast in testing. Hands down the best bot I've made, in my opinion.
creator: Scandalari
